title: Anshul Verma joins SKV Law Offices as Partner
description: Anshul Verma has joined SKV Law Offices as a Partner to lead the firm’s newly established Technology, Data Privacy, Artificial Intelligence and Emerging Technologies Practice.Verma is a 2012 alumna of Gujarat National Law University, Gandhinagar.Recognized for her strong command of technology law, Verma possesses deep expertise across critical domains, including technology outsourcing transactions, enterprise SaaS and cloud agreements, AI regulatory frameworks, data privacy, cybersecurity, IoT e
